title: Valve assembly
abstract: A valve assembly (602) includes a valve body (600). The valve body (600) includes a valve seat (608). The valve seat (608) defines a bore (612) therethrough. The valve body (600) also includes a pair of end members (690, 692) connected to the valve body (600) at opposing sides of the valve body (600). Each of the pair of end members (690, 692) includes a trunnion (694, 696). The valve assembly (602) further includes a valve shaft (604) received in the trunnion (694, 696) of each of the pair of end members (690, 692). The valve assembly (602) includes a valve plate (206) connected to the valve shaft (604). The valve plate (206) is rotatable between a first position and a second position. The valve plate (206) is adjacent to the valve seat (608) when the valve assembly (602) is in the first position.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A valve assembly (602) comprising: a valve body (600) comprising a valve seat (608), the valve seat (608) defining a bore (612) therethrough, wherein the valve body (600) is positioned in an exhaust passageway (112); a pair of end members (690, 692) connected to the valve body (600) at opposing sides of the valve body (600), each of the pair of end members (690, 692) comprising a trunnion (694, 696), wherein each of the trunnions (694, 696) protrudes through a corresponding opening (138) provided in the exhaust passageway (112); a valve shaft (604) received in the trunnion (694, 696) of each of the pair of end members (690, 692); and a valve plate (206) connected to the valve shaft (604), the valve plate (206) being rotatable between a first position and a second position, wherein the valve plate (206) is adjacent to the valve seat (608) when the valve assembly (602) is in the first position. 2. The valve assembly (104) of claim 1, wherein the valve body (202) is integrally formed by at least one of stamping and deep drawing. 3. The valve assembly (602) of claim 1, wherein each of the pair of end members (690, 692) is formed by casting. 4. The valve assembly (602) of claim 1, wherein each of the pair of end members (690, 692) is welded to the valve body (600). 5. The valve assembly (602) of claim 1, wherein the trunnion (694, 696) of one of the pair of end members (690, 692) defines a blind hole (704), and wherein the trunnion (694, 696) of the other end member (690, 692) defines a through hole (702). 6. The valve assembly (602) of claim 1, further comprising: a first pad (272) disposed on a first surface (274) of the valve plate (206), the first pad (272) defining at least one first aperture (276); and 

 a first holding plate (278) disposed on the first pad (272) and comprising at least one first projection (280), the at least one first projection (280) extending through the at least one first aperture (276) of the first pad (272) and contacting the first surface (274) of the valve plate (206), wherein the at least one first projection (280) is welded to the valve plate (206) such that the first pad (272) is secured between the first holding plate (278) and the valve plate (206). 7. The valve assembly (602) of claim 6, further comprising: a second pad (282) disposed on a second surface (284) of the valve plate (206), the second surface (284) being opposite to the first surface (274) of the valve plate (206), the second pad (282) defining at least one second aperture (286); and a second holding plate (288) disposed on the second pad (282) and comprising at least one second projection (290), the at least one second projection (290) extending through the at least one second aperture (286) of the second pad (282) and contacting the second surface (284) of the valve plate (206), wherein the at least one second projection (290) is welded to the valve plate (206) such that the second pad (282) is secured between the second holding plate (288) and the valve plate (206). 8. The valve assembly (602) of claim 1, further comprising: a pair of sleeves (652, 654), each of the pair of sleeves (652, 654) at least partially received within the trunnion (694, 696) of a corresponding end member (690, 692) of the pair of end members (690, 692); and a pair of bushings (648, 650), each of the pair of bushings (648, 650) received at least partially within a corresponding sleeve (652, 654) of the pair of sleeves (652, 654), wherein the valve shaft (604) is at least partially received within the pair of bushings (648, 650). 9. The valve assembly (602) of claim 8, further comprising a pair of washers (644, 646), each of the pair of washers (644, 646) receiving the valve shaft (604) therethrough and disposed adjacent to a corresponding bushing (648, 650) of the pair of bushings (648, 650). 10. The valve assembly of claim 1, wherein the valve plate (206) is adjacent to another valve seat (120) when the valve assembly (602) is in the second position. 11. A valve assembly (802) comprising: a valve body (800) comprising a valve seat (808), the valve seat (808) defining a bore (812) therethrough, wherein the valve body (800) is positioned in an exhaust passageway (112); a bearing member (908) connected to the valve body (800), the bearing member (908) comprising a pair of trunnions (896, 898) at opposing sides of the bearing member (908), wherein each of the trunnions (896, 898) protrudes through a corresponding opening (138) provided in the exhaust passageway (112); a valve shaft (804) received in the pair of trunnions (896, 898); and a valve plate (206) connected to the valve shaft (804), the valve plate (206) being rotatable between a first position and a second position, wherein the valve plate (206) is adjacent to the valve seat (808) when the valve assembly (802) is in the first position. 12. The valve assembly (104) of claim 11, wherein the valve body (202) is integrally formed by at least one of stamping and deep drawing. 13. The valve assembly (802) of claim 11, wherein the bearing member (908) is formed by casting. 14. The valve assembly (802) of claim 11, wherein the bearing member (908) is welded to the valve body (800). 15. The valve assembly (802) of claim 11, further comprising: a first pad (272) disposed on a first surface (274) of the valve plate (206), the first pad (272) defining at least one first aperture (276); and a first holding plate (278) disposed on the first pad (272) and comprising at least one first projection (280), the at least one first projection (280) extending through the at least one first aperture (276) of the first pad (272) and contacting the first surface (274) of the valve plate (206), wherein the at least one first projection (280) is welded to the valve plate (206) such that the first pad (272) is secured between the first holding plate (278) and the valve plate (206). 16. The valve assembly (802) of claim 15, further comprising: a second pad (282) disposed on a second surface (284) of the valve plate (206), the second surface (284) being opposite to the first surface (274) of the valve plate (206), the second pad (282) defining at least one second aperture (286); and a second holding plate (288) disposed on the second pad (282) and comprising at least one second projection (290), the at least one second projection (290) extending through the at least one second aperture (286) of the second pad (282) and contacting the second surface (284) of the valve plate (206), wherein the at least one second projection (290) is welded to the valve plate (206) such that the second pad (282) is secured between the second holding plate (288) and the valve plate (206). 17. The valve assembly (802) of claim 11, further comprising: a pair of sleeves (852, 854), each of the pair of sleeves (852, 854) at least partially received within a corresponding trunnion (896, 898) of the pair of trunnions (896, 898) of the bearing member (908); and a pair of bushings (848, 850), each of the pair of bushings (848, 850) received at least partially within a corresponding sleeve of the pair of sleeves (852, 854), wherein the valve shaft (804) is at least partially received within the pair of bushings (848, 850), 18. The valve assembly (802) of claim 17, further comprising a pair of washers (844, 846), each of the pair of washers (844, 846) receiving the valve shaft (804) therethrough and disposed adjacent to a corresponding bushing of the pair of bushings (848, 850). 19. The valve assembly of claim 11, wherein the valve plate (206) is adjacent to another valve seat (120) when the valve assembly (602) is in the second position.
